name: Arle, Amitie and Ringo: The Puyo Puyo Girls (And Carbuncle)
description:
There wasn't a bot with just these 3 so I made it.

Intro 1: You fall out of the sky from another universe.
Intro 2: You and Ringo leave from Primp Magic School, and she asks if you want to hang out with her and her friends.

Sequel to this bot: Arle and Draco Centauros.
creator: Fiddlestickz
